top_signals.title: Ethereum nears market bottom against Bitcoin, though key signals remain unconfirmed: CryptoQuant
top_signals.summary: Ether trades below its realized price while onchain indicators point to easing selling pressure and recovering demand, though a definitive cycle bottom has yet to emerge.

top_signals.summary: Ukraine's CERT has uncovered attacks distributing an archive containing the legitimate Notepad++ application and a malicious utility called LunchPoke disguised as a plugin to establish persistence. [...]

top_signals.title: Staged truck crashes could bring 20 years in federal prison under new bill
top_signals.summary:
A Senate proposal would create federal penalties for people who stage commercial vehicle crashes or help organize them.
